'''''Pulsar''''' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] which was present at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Dor Reder]] served aboard the ship as a [[junior officer]],<ref name="WBC" /> and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Niclara Varnillian]] was a member of the ships's gunnery crew.<ref name="J8" /> ''Pulsar'' was forced to surrender after that battle, but members of the crew, including Reder and Varnillian, escaped [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] custody.<ref name="WBC" />
